description: Formal definition or specification of a term, concept, or standard within a technical domain

term.description: The term or concept being defined

definition.description: Precise and unambiguous definition of the term

domain.description: Technical domain or field to which the definition belongs

source.description: Origin of the definition (e.g., specification document, standard body, authoritative reference)

examples.description: Illustrative examples that clarify the definition in practice
